item.title: First Wave Landing at Omaha Beach
item.description: A firsthand account of landing in the first wave on Omaha Beach on D-Day, reflecting on courage, service, and the historic invasion.

media:content.media:title: First Wave Landing at Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of landing in the first wave on Omaha Beach on D-Day, reflecting on courage, service, and the historic invasion.

item.title: Fallujah Veteran Reflects on Combat Orders
item.description: A veteran reflects on the rules of engagement in Fallujah and the realities of combat, offering a firsthand military history perspective.

media:content.media:title: Fallujah Veteran Reflects on Combat Orders
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the rules of engagement in Fallujah and the realities of combat, offering a firsthand military history perspective.

item.title: Patton and the Rhine River Story
item.description: A brief historical account tied to General Patton and the Rhine River, presented in a respectful, documentary style.

media:content.media:description: A brief historical account tied to General Patton and the Rhine River, presented in a respectful, documentary style.

item.title: Surviving 6 Years in Vietnam Captivity
item.description: A veteran reflects on surviving six years of captivity in Vietnam, sharing a firsthand account of endurance, service, and survival.

media:content.media:title: Surviving 6 Years in Vietnam Captivity
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on surviving six years of captivity in Vietnam, sharing a firsthand account of endurance, service, and survival.

item.title: Honoring America's Heroes at the 2026 Parade
item.description: A respectful look at the 2026 National Memorial Day Parade honoring America’s heroes and veterans.

media:content.media:title: Honoring America's Heroes at the 2026 Parade
media:content.media:description: A respectful look at the 2026 National Memorial Day Parade honoring America’s heroes and veterans.

item.title: How Veterans Identify a Sniper
item.description: A straightforward look at how soldiers recognize sniper threats, based on firsthand military experience and battlefield awareness.

media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at how soldiers recognize sniper threats, based on firsthand military experience and battlefield awareness.

item.title: Captured and Remembering: Veterans Speak Out
item.description: Veterans reflect on capture, confinement, and the lasting memory of war in this firsthand account from the American Veterans Center.

media:content.media:description: Veterans reflect on capture, confinement, and the lasting memory of war in this firsthand account from the American Veterans Center.

item.title: 101-Year-Old Veteran Remembers Fallen Heroes
item.description: A 101-year-old veteran reflects on the heroes we lost, sharing a personal remembrance shaped by service, sacrifice, and history.

media:content.media:description: A 101-year-old veteran reflects on the heroes we lost, sharing a personal remembrance shaped by service, sacrifice, and history.

item.title: Harry Miller’s WWII Tank Battalion Story
item.description: Harry Miller of the 740th Tank Battalion recalls a fellow soldier who helped a pregnant woman reach the hospital, a kindness remembered decades later.

media:content.media:title: Harry Miller’s WWII Tank Battalion Story
media:content.media:description: Harry Miller of the 740th Tank Battalion recalls a fellow soldier who helped a pregnant woman reach the hospital, a kindness remembered decades later.

item.description: Jack Carr reflects on the combat stories that shaped The Terminal List, offering a veteran’s perspective on service and experience.

media:content.media:description: Jack Carr reflects on the combat stories that shaped The Terminal List, offering a veteran’s perspective on service and experience.

item.description: A veteran reflects on carrying the grenade launcher, sharing a firsthand military memory with a focus on service and experience.

item.title: WWII and Vietnam POWs Reflect on Captivity
item.description: WWII POW Lester Schrenk and Vietnam POW Eugene “Red” McDaniel discuss captivity, resilience, and the shared experience of American servicemen.

media:content.media:title: WWII and Vietnam POWs Reflect on Captivity
media:content.media:description: WWII POW Lester Schrenk and Vietnam POW Eugene “Red” McDaniel discuss captivity, resilience, and the shared experience of American servicemen.
